Sameera Farvin

Tech Professional | Junior Full Stack Web Developer

I build modern, responsive websites and web applications designed to help businesses grow online. I create websites that are visually appealing, functional, and user-friendly. Whether you need a business website, portfolio, or custom web application, I can help bring your ideas to life.

About Me

I am a Full Stack Web Developer who completed a 16-week Skills Bootcamp in Full Stack Development with Code Institute. During the programme I developed strong skills in both front-end and back-end development, learning how to design, build, and deploy modern web applications.

My goal is to help businesses and individuals create a strong digital presence by building reliable and professional websites. I am passionate about continuous learning and improving my skills while delivering practical solutions for clients.
